subject: Re: M not responding
body:
Hi Shyamal,

I have a weird recurring issue which is similar, M sometimes hangs when trying to write files at the end of a refinement. In my case it seems to be some file permissions issue, even though everywhere I have full access unclicking the read-only checkbox and applying recursively down through the directory seems to fix it!

Cheers,

Alister

> On 18 Aug 2020, at 17:41, shyamal narayan <narayanshyamal@gmail.com> wrote:
> 
> ﻿
> Hi Dimitry and others,
> 
> I am running M (v1.0.9) and there was no problem. However, after sometime there is no progress and it stuck on a tilt series (TS_749, please see attached) for almost an hour now. 
> Did anyone have a similar problem? and is there a way to fix this?
> Please let me know,
> Thank you,
> Shyamal
> <Screenshot 2020-08-18 at 17.34.59.png>
>
